name: community-hps-catppuccin-mocha
title: Catppuccin Mocha
description: Soothing dark deck theme in the community-favorite Catppuccin Mocha palette: ink-purple #1e1e2e ground, lavender #cdd6f4 text, mauve/blue/pink pastel accents, a mauve→blue→teal gradient, 14px radii and soft shadows — built for developers reading dark screens for long stretches. Single-file HTML scroll-snap deck with keyboard navigation and a signature terminal card for code and CLI content. Based on lewislulu/html-ppt-skill catppuccin-mocha.

description_i18n.en: Soothing dark deck theme in the community-favorite Catppuccin Mocha palette: ink-purple #1e1e2e ground, lavender #cdd6f4 text, mauve/blue/pink pastel accents, a mauve→blue→teal gradient, 14px radii and soft shadows — built for developers reading dark screens for long stretches. Single-file HTML scroll-snap deck with keyboard navigation and a signature terminal card for code and CLI content. Based on lewislulu/html-ppt-skill catppuccin-mocha.
description_i18n.zh-CN: 社区顶流暗色幻灯片主题「Catppuccin 摩卡夜」：墨紫 #1e1e2e 底 + 薰衣草 #cdd6f4 文本 + mauve/blue/pink 粉彩 accent，mauve→blue→teal 渐变，14px 圆角软阴影，为开发者长时间暗色阅读而生。零依赖单文件 HTML 滚动吸附幻灯片，键盘翻页，并带有用于代码/CLI 内容的签名终端卡片。移植自 lewislulu/html-ppt-skill 的 catppuccin-mocha 主题。

query.en: Create a Catppuccin Mocha deck about {{topic}} for {{audience}} ({{slideCount}}, {{density}}): a soothing dark developer-friendly presentation in the locked catppuccin-mocha theme from lewislulu/html-ppt-skill. Output one self-contained single-file HTML deck with zero dependencies - all CSS/JS inline, no build step, no external JS libraries, no CDN scripts; only Google Fonts CSS @import may be used. THEME IS LOCKED - reproduce exactly: (a) Tokens: --bg:#1e1e2e; --bg-soft:#181825; --surface:#313244; --surface-2:#45475a; --border:rgba(205,214,244,.12); --border-strong:rgba(205,214,244,.24); --text-1:#cdd6f4; --text-2:#a6adc8; --text-3:#7f849c; --accent:#cba6f7 (mauve); --accent-2:#89b4fa (blue); --accent-3:#f5c2e7 (pink); --good:#a6e3a1; --warn:#f9e2af; --bad:#f38ba8; --grad:linear-gradient(135deg,#cba6f7,#89b4fa 50%,#94e2d5); --grad-soft:linear-gradient(135deg,#313244,#45475a); --radius:14px; --radius-sm:10px; --radius-lg:22px; --shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.35); --shadow-lg:0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.5); fonts 'Inter'+'Noto Sans SC' display/body, 'Playfair Display'+'Noto Serif SC' for quotes only, 'JetBrains Mono' for code/terminal/chips; easing cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1). Slides reference tokens only - never hard-code a hex value in slide markup; no other hues, no pure white, no pure black, no hard borders. (b) Signature devices: the Mocha glow - every .slide::before paints two whisper-quiet radial glows, mauve rgba(203,166,247,.07) top-left and blue rgba(137,180,250,.06) bottom-right, over the #1e1e2e ink (keep opacities at or below these values); the .terminal card - a --bg-soft panel with three traffic-light dots colored --bad/--warn/--good, a JetBrains Mono <pre> body and token-colored spans, used for any code/CLI/log/trace content; gradient ink - .gradient-text, .divider-accent, progress bar and chart bars all run the mauve-blue-teal --grad, at most one gradient emphasis per slide. (c) Slide system: <div class="deck" id="deck"> as a horizontal scroll-snap strip of <section class="slide" data-title="..."> pages, each exactly 100vw x 100vh (flex:0 0 100vw), 16:9 / 1280x720 design baseline fluid via clamp() type scales, slide padding 72px 96px; one screen per slide with no internal scrolling - split content into more slides instead of shrinking type. Fixed chrome: .deck-header (title + catppuccin-mocha theme chip), .deck-footer (attribution + N / total counter), gradient .progress-bar. (d) Navigation: keyboard arrows/Space/PageUp/PageDown/Home/End, #/N hash routing with history.replaceState wrapped in try/catch (srcdoc-safe), dual window+document capture-phase key listeners deduped by Event identity, and body auto-focus so keys work without a click - keep the seed script verbatim, no theme cycling. (e) Layout masters to compose from (the seed demonstrates 11): cover with gradient headline and pill row, toc card grid, section divider with oversized ghost number in --surface, two-column claim + terminal card, kpi-grid of four gradient numerals, stat-highlight giant number, pure-CSS bar chart on the gradient token, numbered process-steps cards, before/after comparison with --bad/--good eyebrows, serif big-quote, thanks/cta closer; the full upstream 31-layout catalog in SKILL.md is available for additional pages. (f) Motion restraint: inlined anim-rise-in / anim-fade-up / anim-stagger-list only - at most one hero animation plus one stagger list per slide. (g) Content: real content with no lorem ipsum, charts rebuilt in pure CSS or inline SVG (no chart libraries, no external images, icons inline SVG only), and 1-3 sentences of speaker notes per slide in a hidden .notes block. Start from the example.html seed shipped in this plugin: keep its :root token sheet, style blocks and navigation script verbatim; replace only the slide content. Do not introduce any color or font outside this specification and do not redesign the theme.
query.zh-CN: 用「Catppuccin 摩卡夜」主题为 {{audience}} 创作一套关于 {{topic}} 的演示（{{slideCount}}，{{density}}）：墨紫 #1e1e2e 底 + 薰衣草 #cdd6f4 文本 + mauve/blue/pink 粉彩 accent 的舒缓暗色开发者风格，mauve→blue→teal 渐变、14px 圆角软阴影。零依赖单文件 HTML：横向滚动吸附 slide 骨架（100vw×100vh 一屏一卡，72px 96px 内边距）、键盘翻页 + #/N 哈希路由、双层去重按键监听；签名装置为 Mocha 微光晕、终端卡片（红黄绿三点 + JetBrains Mono）与渐变点睛（每页至多一处）。从插件内 example.html 种子出发：完整保留 token 表、样式块和导航脚本，只替换幻灯片内容；图表用纯 CSS/SVG 重建，真实内容不用 lorem ipsum，每页在隐藏 .notes 里写 1-3 句演讲备注；禁止引入规格之外的颜色和字体。完整硬性规格以英文 prompt 为准。

title_i18n.zh-CN: Loomtrace 技术分享 · Catppuccin 摩卡夜风格

inputs.label: Topic
inputs.placeholder: A tech-sharing talk, an architecture review, a postmortem...

inputs.label: Audience
inputs.placeholder: Engineers, an SRE guild, open-source contributors...
